name: Genus PLC
description: The world's leading animal genetics company, improving livestock health and productivity for farmers through elite porcine (PIC) and bovine (ABS) genetics, sexing technology and gene editing.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Global demand for animal protein driving genetic improvement. Revenue £672.8m in FY2025 (+1% actual, +5% constant currency). PIC porcine revenue £362.9m (+8% CC), ABS bovine revenue £307.7m (+2% CC). Royalty revenue model provides visibility. PRP gene edit FDA-approved — commercialisation opportunity ahead.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted operating profit exc JVs rose 21% to £81.1m in FY2025 (margin 12.1%). PIC margin 27.6% exc JV. ABS margin improved to 6.3% via Value Acceleration Programme (VAP) — £11.8m benefit in FY25, Phase 3 targeting further £9m annualised benefit. R&D spend declining as % of revenue (2.5% in FY25).
assumptions.risks: FX exposure (significant Mexican Peso, Brazilian Real headwinds — £8.5m translation impact in FY2025). China market volatility. Disease outbreaks (ASF, PRRSv, BRD). PRP commercialisation execution risk and regulatory approvals in key export markets. Net debt of £228m (1.5x EBITDA). Biological asset valuation volatility under IAS 41.
assumptions.catalyst: PRP gene edit commercialisation in US and international markets. VAP Phase 3 delivering further ABS margin improvement. Strong cash conversion (114% in FY2025). Royalty revenue growth in PIC China. Sexcel/IntelliGen sexing technology expansion.
